files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ on:
 env:
   NODE_VERSION: "24"
   ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED: "1"
+  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: "true"
 
 jobs:
   build:
@@ -22,7 +23,6 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
-          cache: "pnpm"
 
       - name: Enable pnpm
         run: corepack enable

@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ on:
 
 env:
   NODE_VERSION: "24"
+  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: "true"
 
 jobs:
   lint:
@@ -21,7 +22,6 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
-          cache: "pnpm"
 
       - name: Enable pnpm
         run: corepack enable
